headline: How Merck's New Cholesterol Buster Will 'Move The Needle' 'By Removing The Needle'
summary: Merck's experimental cholesterol buster easily outperformed a triplet of medications, the Dow Jones component said Monday.

headline: AZN Stock Gains as COPD Drug Clears Two Late-Stage Studies
summary: AstraZeneca jumps as tozorakimab hits primary goals in two phase III COPD trials, cuts exacerbations and shows promise in a disease with limited options.

headline: Regeneron Pharma (REGN) Shares Up After Jim Cramer Called It a Good Stock
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) is one of Jim Cramer’s Hottest GLP-1 and Weight Loss Stock Picks. Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) is a biotechnology company that focuses on a variety of ailments involving the neurological, cardiovascular, and other ailments. The firm is focused on developing weight loss drugs that enable users to retain lean muscle mass […]
